Patch Set 2:

Ideally this should be a flag in LDLM's namespace saying LDLM locks shouldn't be cached. probably Oleg can suggest the best way.

Patch Set 2:

"Ideally this should be a flag in LDLM's namespace saying LDLM locks shouldn't be cached. probably Oleg can suggest the best way."

I prefer to let MDT explicitly cancel the lock, instead of cancel it inside LDLM.

parents.subject: LU-4423 ptlrpc: incorrect AT index type

commit.subject: LU-7091 mdt: release cross-MDT lock immediately
commit.message:
LU-7091 mdt: release cross-MDT lock immediately

Because the cross-MDT operations are relatively rare
compared with the normal operation, so let's release
cross-MDT lock immediately after the operation.

Signed-off-by: wang di <di.wang@intel.com>
Change-Id: I48be60a13e9d10a92595c7faeb91dd8c106b2d42
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/16372
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
